heading: Civil rights cases
label: 1443 Civil rights cases
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 74 (, ).Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 3136 Stat. 1096Other provisions of , U.S.C., 1940 ed., are incorporated in sections 1446 and 1447 of this title.section 74 of title 28Words “or in the part of the State where such suit or prosecution is pending” after “courts of such States,” were omitted as unnecessary.Changes were made in phraseology.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 74 (, ).Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 3136 Stat. 1096Other provisions of , U.S.C., 1940 ed., are incorporated in sections 1446 and 1447 of this title.section 74 of title 28Words “or in the part of the State where such suit or prosecution is pending” after “courts of such States,” were omitted as unnecessary.Changes were made in phraseology.

children.text: Against any person who is denied or cannot enforce in the courts of such State a right under any law providing for the equal civil rights of citizens of the United States, or of all persons within the jurisdiction thereof;
For any act under color of authority derived from any law providing for equal rights, or for refusing to do any act on the ground that it would be inconsistent with such law.
